response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The provided lyrics reference was extremely incomplete and had scrambled parts. Manual transcription was conducted for the majority of the song lyrics, the spoken interlude, and the entire post-performance talking segment. 2. JSON Usage: Partially used the base song structure for referencing, but discarded the incomplete parts to perform precise manual transcription and translation. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to the vocal bursts, especially during the fast transitions of the song, preventing cascading delays. Silence during the instrumental interludes is strictly respected.

subtitles.english: At that time, I wasn't even thinking about graduation,

subtitles.original: キャッチコピーは、握力50キロ、ぎゅーぎゅー握りつぶしちゃうぞ！ホロライブ4期生、かなたちゃんこと天音かなたです！
subtitles.english: My catchphrase is: with 50kg grip strength, I'll squeeze you tight! Hololive 4th gen, Kanata-chan also known as Amane Kanata!

subtitles.original: はい、ということでね、録音、あぶなっ！
subtitles.english: Alright, with that said... wait, recording? That was close!
